---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new rule, output format, or capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that rust-doctor doesn't support today? What's the
pain?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. For a new rule, describe the pattern it should catch and
why it matters (security / performance / correctness / maintainability).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've tried or thought about (existing flags, other tools).

## Additional context

Links, examples, or prior art (e.g. a clippy lint or another analyzer).
